'''ngabava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibbly|nibbly]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibbly|nibbly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngabava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæbævæth|ngæbævæth]] || [[word:ngæbævæj|ngæbævæj]] || [[word:ngæbævæsh|ngæbævæsh]] || [[word:ngæbævæ|ngæbævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngababavath|ngababavath]] || [[word:ngababavaj|ngababavaj]] || [[word:ngababavash|ngababavash]] || [[word:ngababava|ngababava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngabavath|ngabavath]] || [[word:ngabavaj|ngabavaj]] || [[word:ngabavash|ngabavash]] || [[word:ngabava|ngabava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngabafvath|ngabafvath]] || [[word:ngabafvaj|ngabafvaj]] || [[word:ngabafvash|ngabafvash]] || [[word:ngabafvaf|ngabafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngabavatha|ngabavatha]] || [[word:ngabavaja|ngabavaja]] || [[word:ngabavasha|ngabavasha]] || [[word:ngabavaka|ngabavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngabavath|ngabavath]] || [[word:ngabavaj|ngabavaj]] || [[word:ngabavash|ngabavash]] || [[word:ngabava|ngabava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngabavathal|ngabavathal]] || [[word:ngabavajal|ngabavajal]] || [[word:ngabavashal|ngabavashal]] || [[word:ngabavakal|ngabavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngabavathatha|ngabavathatha]] || [[word:ngabavajaja|ngabavajaja]] || [[word:ngabavashasha|ngabavashasha]] || [[word:ngabavaka|ngabavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngabavathan|ngabavathan]] || [[word:ngabavajan|ngabavajan]] || [[word:ngabavashan|ngabavashan]] || [[word:ngabavakan|ngabavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngabavathaoro|ngabavathaoro]] || [[word:ngabavajaoro|ngabavajaoro]] || [[word:ngabavashaoro|ngabavashaoro]] || [[word:ngabavakaoro|ngabavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
